results.rendered_html: a-hiṃsā f. not injuring anything, harmlessness (one of the cardinal virtues of most Hindū sects, but particularly of the Buddhists and Jains; also personified as the wife of Dharma,  VāmP. ),  ChUp. ;  Nir. ;  Mn.  &c.

ahiṃsā

2 Security.
